SEARCH
Module org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject
Package org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.utils

Class NodeConsts

java.lang.Object
org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.utils.NodeConsts
public class NodeConsts extends Object
Provides reusable UI components and constants. Includes factory methods for creating styled JavaFX nodes such as buttons, layouts, labels, dialogs, menus, and image utilities. Design Choice: Centralizing UI logic ensures consistency, reduces duplication, and simplifies UI management across the application.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Faariz Sheikh
Date:
2026-03-17

  • Method Details

    • root

      public static javafx.scene.layout.BorderPane root(javafx.stage.Stage stage)
      Creates a responsive root layout bound to the given stage size.
      Parameters:
      stage - application window stage
      Returns:
      a BorderPane bound to stage width and height

    • gP

      public static javafx.scene.layout.GridPane gP()
      Creates a preconfigured GridPane with center alignment and spacing.
      Returns:
      configured GridPane instance

    • vBox

      public static javafx.scene.layout.VBox vBox()
      Creates a preconfigured VBox container with center alignment.
      Returns:
      configured VBox instance

    • button

      public static javafx.scene.control.Button button(String text, String style)
      Creates a styled JavaFX Button with hover animation applied.
      Parameters:
      text - button text
      style - CSS style class
      Returns:
      styled Button instance

    • btnHoverAnimation

      public static void btnHoverAnimation(javafx.scene.control.Button btn)
      Applies a hover scale animation effect to a JavaFX Button.
      Parameters:
      btn - the button to animate (must not be null)
      API Note:
      This method modifies mouse event handlers of the button.

    • formLabel

      public static javafx.scene.control.Label formLabel(String text)
      Creates a styled form label.
      Parameters:
      text - label text
      Returns:
      styled Label instance

    • tableLabel

      public static javafx.scene.control.Label tableLabel(String text, double width)
      Creates a styled table label with a fixed preferred width.
      Parameters:
      text - label text
      width - preferred width in pixels
      Returns:
      configured Label instance

    • tabTitle

      public static javafx.scene.text.Text tabTitle(String text)
      Creates a styled tab title text node.
      Parameters:
      text - title text
      Returns:
      configured Text node

    • columnWidth

      public static double columnWidth(int i)
      Returns a predefined column width based on column index mapping.
      Parameters:
      i - column index matching table schema
      Returns:
      column width in pixels

    • gameImage

      public static javafx.scene.image.ImageView gameImage(String url)
      Loads an image from a URL and applies fixed display sizing. If the URL is null, empty, or invalid, a default fallback image is used.
      Parameters:
      url - image URL (can be null or invalid)
      Returns:
      ImageView containing loaded or fallback image
      Implementation Note:
      Uses asynchronous loading for remote images and falls back to a bundled default image on failure.

    • mainMenu

      public static javafx.scene.control.MenuBar mainMenu()
      Creates the main application menu bar with File and Credits menus.
      Returns:
      configured MenuBar instance

    • alert

      public static void alert(javafx.scene.control.Alert.AlertType type, String title, String header, javafx.scene.Node... nodes)
      Displays a styled JavaFX alert dialog with custom content nodes.
      Parameters:
      type - alert type
      title - dialog title
      header - dialog header text
      nodes - content nodes (must not be null)
      API Note:
      Applies CSS styling and hover effects to dialog buttons.

    • showExitConfirmation

      public static void showExitConfirmation()
      Displays a confirmation dialog before exiting the application. If confirmed, the application will terminate.

    • devCredits

      public static void devCredits()
      Displays a modal dialog showing developer credits.
      API Note:
      This method creates and displays a JavaFX information dialog.

    • resourceCredits

      public static void resourceCredits()
      Displays a dialog listing technologies and tools used in the project.

    • exceedsMax

      public static boolean exceedsMax(String value, int max, String fieldName)
      Validates whether a string exceeds a maximum allowed length.
      Parameters:
      value - input value (must not be null)
      max - maximum allowed length
      fieldName - field name used in error message
      Returns:
      true if value exceeds limit, false otherwise
      API Note:
      Displays a warning dialog if validation fails.

    • applyCSS

      public static void applyCSS(javafx.scene.Scene scene)
      Applies the main stylesheet to a JavaFX Scene.
      Parameters:
      scene - scene to style

    • applyCSS

      public static void applyCSS(javafx.scene.control.Alert alert)
      Applies the main stylesheet to an Alert dialog.
      Parameters:
      alert - alert to style
